title: AI Coding Tools Were Lying to You
summary: Kiro CLI is a code intelligence tool that uses Language Server Protocol (LSP) to enable AI-assisted code editing with semantic understanding. It provides symbol lookup, AST-based pattern search, error detection, and safe refactoring capabilities.
